data.name: GetExpedientes
data.value:
USE [DB_Miharu.Imaging_Core]
SELECT DISTINCT LLAVE.fk_Entidad ,LLAVE.fk_Proyecto ,ImagingFile.fk_Expediente ,ImagingFile.fk_Folder ,ImagingFile.fk_File ,ImagingFile.id_Version ,ImagingFile.File_Unique_Identifier ,Documento.Nombre_Documento ,Llave_01 + ISNULL( '_' + Llave_02,'') + '_' + CAST(fk_Tipologia AS VARCHAR(100)) + '_' + CAST(ImagingFile.fk_File AS VARCHAR(100)) AS Nombre_Imagen_File ,ImagingFile.Folios_Documento_File ,ImagingFile.Tamaño_Imagen_File ,ProcessFile.fk_Documento ,0 AS fk_Grupo ,LLAVE.Llave_01 AS Llave_01 ,LLAVE.Llave_02 AS Llave_02 ,Documento.fk_Tipologia ,CASE WHEN File2.fk_Expediente IS NOT NULL THEN 2 WHEN File3.fk_Expediente IS NOT NULL THEN 3 WHEN File4.fk_Expediente IS NOT NULL THEN 4 WHEN File5.fk_Expediente IS NOT NULL THEN 5 END AS fk_ServidorStorage INTO #TempExpedientes FROM ##TempTableLogs T INNER JOIN [DB_Miharu.Core].Process.TBL_Folder PFolder WITH(NOLOCK) ON T.Carpeta = PFolder.Cbarras_Folder INNER JOIN [DB_Miharu.Core].[Process].[TBL_Expediente_Llave_Linea] LLAVE WITH(NOLOCK) ON PFolder.fk_Expediente = Llave.fk_Expediente INNER JOIN [DB_Miharu.Core].Process.TBL_File AS ProcessFile WITH(NOLOCK) ON PFolder.fk_Expediente = ProcessFile.fk_Expediente AND PFolder.id_Folder = ProcessFile.fk_Folder INNER JOIN [DB_Miharu.Core].Imaging.TBL_File ImagingFile WITH(NOLOCK) ON ImagingFile.fk_Expediente = ProcessFile.fk_Expediente AND ImagingFile.fk_Folder = ProcessFile.fk_Folder AND ImagingFile.fk_File = ProcessFile.id_File INNER JOIN [DB_Miharu.Core].Process.TBL_File_Estado FE WITH(NOLOCK) ON FE.fk_Expediente = ImagingFile.fk_Expediente AND FE.fk_Folder = ImagingFile.fk_Folder AND FE.fk_File = ImagingFile.fk_File AND FE.Modulo = 7 AND FE.fk_Estado >= 20 INNER JOIN [DB_Miharu.Core].Config.TBL_Documento AS Documento WITH(NOLOCK) ON ProcessFile.fk_Documento = Documento.id_Documento INNER JOIN [DB_Miharu.Archiving].Risk.TBL_File RFile WITH(NOLOCK) ON RFile.fk_Expediente = ImagingFile.fk_Expediente AND RFile.fk_Folder = ImagingFile.fk_Folder AND RFile.id_File = ImagingFile.fk_File INNER JOIN [DB_Miharu.Archiving].Risk.TBL_OT ROT WITH(NOLOCK) ON ROT.id_OT = RFile.fk_OT AND ROT.Fecha_OT < '2019-07-09 23:59:59.999' LEFT JOIN [DB_Miharu.Imaging_Storage].Imaging.TBL_File File2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON File2.fk_Expediente = ProcessFile.fk_Expediente AND File2.fk_Folder = ProcessFile.fk_Folder AND File2.fk_File = ProcessFile.id_File LEFT JOIN [Historico].[DB_Miharu.Imaging_Storage].Imaging.TBL_File File3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON File3.fk_Expediente = ProcessFile.fk_Expediente AND File3.fk_Folder = ProcessFile.fk_Folder AND File3.fk_File = ProcessFile.id_File LEFT JOIN [Historico].[DB_Miharu.Imaging_Storage_2].Imaging.TBL_File File4 WITH(NOLOCK) ON File4.fk_Expediente = ProcessFile.fk_Expediente AND File4.fk_Folder = ProcessFile.fk_Folder AND File4.fk_File = ProcessFile.id_File LEFT JOIN [Historico].[DB_Miharu.Imaging_Storage_3].Imaging.TBL_File File5 WITH(NOLOCK) ON File5.fk_Expediente = ProcessFile.fk_Expediente AND File5.fk_Folder = ProcessFile.fk_Folder AND File5.fk_File = ProcessFile.id_File
UPDATE #TempExpedientes SET fk_ServidorStorage = 1 WHERE(fk_ServidorStorage IS NULL)
SELECT * FROM #TempExpedientes
DROP TABLE #TempExpedientes
